mapper.select: SELECT MM.TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId, MM.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, MM.AGNT_CD as agntCd, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = MM.AGNT_CD AND CMPY_CD = MM.CMPY_CD) as agntNm, MM.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, MM.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, ISNULL(MM.CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) as currentQty, MM.SAVE_TIME as saveTime, MM.SAVE_USER as saveUser, MM.UPDT_TIME as updtTime, MM.UPDT_USER as updtUser FROM TBL_MTRL_M MM WHERE MM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND MM.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MM.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND MM.MTO_YN = 'N' -- MTO가 아닌 상품만 재고 관리
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{agntNm}, #{tblMtrlMId}, #{mtrlCd}, #{mtrlNm}, #{adjustmentType}, #{beforeQty}, #{adjustmentQty}, #{afterQty}, #{adjustmentReason}, #{adjustmentDate}, GETDATE(), #{saveUser}, GETDATE(), #{updtUser}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT ia.TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT_ID as tblInvAdjustmentId, ia.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, ia.AGNT_CD as agntCd, ia.AGNT_NM as agntNm, ia.TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId, ia.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, ia.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, ia.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE as adjustmentType, ia.BEFORE_QTY as beforeQty, ia.ADJUSTMENT_QTY as adjustmentQty, ia.AFTER_QTY as afterQty, ia.ADJUSTMENT_REASON as adjustmentReason, ia.ADJUSTMENT_DATE as adjustmentDate, ia.SAVE_TIME as saveTime, ia.SAVE_USER as saveUser, ia.UPDT_TIME as updtTime, ia.UPDT_USER as updtUser, ia.DELETED_YN as deletedYn FROM TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ia WHERE (ia.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ia.DELETED_YN = 'N') AND ia.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND ia.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND ia.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} ORDER BY ia.ADJUSTMENT_DATE DESC, ia.SAVE_TIME DESC
